short: A node-based visual interface for building generative image and video workflows.
definition: ComfyUI is an open-source, node-based interface for building generative media workflows, most often around diffusion models like Stable Diffusion. Each step — loading a model, encoding a prompt, sampling, post-processing — is a node, and users connect nodes into a graph to control the full pipeline. Its visual, modular design gives fine-grained control and makes complex image and video generation reproducible.
